results.title: Clawdbot
results.description: Clawdbot is a multi-platform AI agent gateway that bridges WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, and iMessage to coding agents, enabling users to send messages and receive agent responses from their pocket.

results.title: Clawdbot
results.description: Clawdbot is an AI gateway and automation platform that manages OAuth credentials, schedules cron jobs, and orchestrates agent workflows with multi-channel delivery capabilities.

results.title: Clawdbot
results.description: Clawdbot is a personal AI assistant designed to run on your own devices, offering multi-surface interaction, voice capabilities, and a live Canvas across platforms like WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, macOS, and iOS.

results.title: Nix Clawdbot
results.description: A declarative Nix package for Clawdbot that provides an AI assistant gateway with plugin support, running as a service on macOS and Linux with reproducible, version-locked dependencies.

results.title: RSBot
results.description: A Silkroad Online Open Source Bot

results.title: SQLBot
results.description: SQLBot is an intelligent data querying system based on large models and RAG, offering out-of-the-box functionality, easy integration, and secure, controllable data access.

results.title: Moltbot
results.description: Moltbot is a multi-platform gateway that bridges WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, and iMessage to AI coding agents, enabling chat interactions across multiple messaging services.

results.title: Moltbot
results.description: Moltbot is a personal AI assistant that runs on your own devices and connects to multiple messaging platforms including WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, Discord, and others, with voice capabilities and a live canvas interface.

results.title: Abot
results.description: Abot is an open-source C# web crawler framework designed for speed and flexibility, handling low-level tasks like multithreading and HTTP requests, allowing users to focus on event processing and custom implementations.

results.title: Moltbot
results.description: Moltbot is an AI agent platform that enables rapid deployment and management of AI agents across various chat channels like WhatsApp, Telegram, and Discord, featuring a CLI, gateway, and skill integration.

results.title: PyTDBot Client
results.description: Pytdbot is an asynchronous TDLib wrapper for Telegram users and bots, written in Python, offering features like ease of use, performance, scalability, and decorator-based updates.

results.title: Nautobot
results.description: Nautobot is a Network Source of Truth and Network Automation Platform built as a web application using Django, Python, and a PostgreSQL or MySQL database.

results.title: Certbot
results.description: Certbot is EFF's tool to obtain certs from Let's Encrypt and (optionally) auto-enable HTTPS on your server.  It can also act as a client for any other CA that uses the ACME protocol.

results.title: Mwbot
results.description: Mwbot is a batteries-included framework for building bots and tools for MediaWiki wikis, building on top of the mwapi and parsoid crates.

results.title: Errbot
results.description: Errbot is a chatbot, a daemon that connects to your favorite chat service and bring your tools and some fun into the conversation.

results.title: Mwbot
results.description: Mwbot is a batteries-included framework for building bots and tools for MediaWiki wikis, leveraging mwapi and parsoid crates for lower-level APIs.

results.title: Snowbot
results.description: Snowbot is a Lua scripting automation bot for game management featuring character control, combat AI, navigation, economy systems, and quest handling with 26 modules and 570 functions.

results.title: Hummingbot
results.description: Hummingbot is an open-source framework for designing and deploying automated trading strategies (bots) across various centralized and decentralized exchanges, aiming to democratize high-frequency trading.

results.title: Gunbot
results.description: Gunbot is an advanced, easy-to-use crypto trading bot offering unique features like real-time strategy visualization, custom strategies, and AI, supporting trading on various spot and futures crypto exchanges.

results.title: Chatbot UI
results.description: The open-source AI chat app for everyone.

results.title: BryanBot
results.description: BryanBot: the modular, up-to-date Discord bot that just works.

results.title: NoneBot
results.description: NoneBot 是一个现代、跨平台、可扩展的 Python 聊天机器人框架，它基于 Python 的类型注解和异步优先特性，提供便捷灵活的支持，并拥有丰富的插件生态。

results.title: Banbot
results.description: Banbot is a high-performance, event-driven trading robot supporting multiple symbols, strategies, periods, and accounts, with a web UI for strategy development and backtesting.

results.title: Nautobot
results.description: Nautobot is a Network Source of Truth and Network Automation Platform built as a web application atop the Django Python framework with a PostgreSQL or MySQL database, offering flexible data models and extensibility for network automation solutions.

results.title: Snowbot
results.description: Snowbot is a platform that provides a comprehensive Lua API for scripting and automating characters in Dofus, offering extensive functions for combat, navigation, economy, and multi-account management.

results.title: Inubot
results.description: Inubot is a platform that provides a launcher, client, and SDK for developing automation scripts, particularly for Jagex Accounts.

results.title: Hummingbot
results.description: Hummingbot is a community-driven, open-source Python framework for building automated market making and algorithmic trading bots, designed to be modular and extensible for any strategy on any exchange and blockchain.

results.title: AMLBot
results.description: AMLBot is a full-fledged crypto compliance solution for businesses, offering API integration, investigation, and consulting services.

results.title: DrawBot
results.description: DrawBot is a free MacOSX application that enables users to write simple Python scripts to generate two-dimensional graphics with built-in primitives for shapes, text, and transparency.
